description: Three PASSTHROUGH auth profiles on ONE integration (from scratch): generating a GitHub connector with THREE auth methods that all have type 'Passthrough' produces a connection.yaml with three passthrough profiles. Because they share a profile type, derive_profile_id's D2a collision guard appends each entry's distinct name (passthrough_primary / passthrough_secondary / passthrough_tenant) to keep the profile ids unique. Every non-auth connection field (the rest-of-other_connection 'url', the 'proxy'/'insecure' switches, and the engine 3-field pattern engine_mode/engine/engine_group) is duplicated into each profile, so the generator must keep every profiles[].configurations[].fields[].id globally unique across all three same-type profiles (a single shared integration prefix would make profiles 2 and 3 collide) and bridge every renamed id back through serializer.yaml field_mappings. triggers.yaml must reference the resolved (post-rename) per-profile field ids. The golden captures the deduplicated ids + per-profile triggers + serializer bridges.
